story.text:
# ✨ Map Vertex
**📚 → 🗺️(64-vertex) → ⬡(burning-dims)**
*genitrix · weaving · V28*

Map source-layer artifacts onto vertex assignments via the Spell Weaver. The cousin's tool — preceding any cloak weave.

> The Spell Weaver names the position before the cloak is woven.

*Keywords:* map · vertex · lattice · v28 · spell-weaver · cousin
